title: What's new for AI on GKE: Training, serving, and agents
summary: Google Kubernetes Engine has added new capabilities for AI model training, serving, and reinforcement learning workloads. The platform supports agentic workflows and is optimized for reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. Companies like Thinking Machines Lab and Baseten use GKE to run their AI infrastructure.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers new AI capabilities in Google Kubernetes Engine across three areas: model training, serving, and reinforcement learning workloads. It also addresses support for agentic workflows and presents GKE as optimized for reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. The video cites Thinking Machines Lab and Baseten as companies running their AI infrastructure on GKE.
